inputs.name: x
inputs.desc: Input tensor [tokens, 2*dim], split into [gate, up] along last dim

outputs.name: out
outputs.desc: Exact GeGLU output tensor [tokens, dim], where out = GELU_tanh(gate) * up

impl.c_declaration: void geglu_forward_exact(const float *x, float *out, int tokens, int dim);

notes: Exact GeGLU forward for training/parity: out = GELU_tanh(gate) * up using scalar tanhf semantics.
